metadata.description: RavenClaude — a private marketplace of opinionated Claude Code plugins. Ships ravenclaude-core (the Team Lead + 14 specialists pattern) and power-platform (11 Microsoft Power Platform specialists + bundled pbix-mcp) today; finance, EdTech, and Salesforce plugins planned.

plugins.name: ravenclaude-core
plugins.description: Domain-neutral Claude Code plugin: 14 specialist agents (architect, coders, reviewers, designer, documentarian, deep-researcher, data-engineer, project-manager, partner-success-manager, prompt-engineer, etc.), team-lead dispatch playbook, format/lint/test gates, contribution-staging workflow (with security sweep + expert-routing gates), and templates for memos, runbooks, design specs, RAID logs, and partner-success artifacts.

plugins.name: power-platform
plugins.description: Microsoft Power Platform specialist team — now includes dedicated power-platform-tester (Test Studio, flow run-history-driven assertions, DAX measure-tests + VertiPaq diagnostics, `pac solution check`) and power-bi-engineer (semantic models, DAX, PBIP git + Azure DevOps integration) alongside canvas/Power Fx, Power Automate + custom connectors, Dataverse modeling/security, model-driven apps, pac CLI + ALM (enhanced for ADO + flows), tenant governance/DLP, PCF, Copilot Studio + AI Builder, Power Pages. Plus imported veteran skills. Also bundles the community pbix-mcp server (d0nk3yhm/pbix-mcp, MIT) for Power BI .pbix/.pbit read/write/DAX-eval without Power BI Desktop (requires `pip install pbix-mcp`). Strong focus on reproducible ALM, git workflows, and production-grade patterns.
